title: GreyCore Horizons
description: A modpack focused on making Minecraft as enjoyable as possible while staying true to the vanilla experience.
body:
# This modpack is designed to be played with shaders.
I have already configured most of the settings, but feel free to adjust them.

### Content included in the modpack:
- Numerous optimization mods designed to work best with shaders.
- Enhanced visuals: The GUI is revamped, as are all entity animations (including the player), better block blending, improved sound design, and better ambience. The game looks and sounds incredible even without shaders.
- Terralith and Tectonic are the basis of the world generation, as well as the Better End and Better Nether mods.
- The Ender Dragon fight has been revamped.
- QoL mods such as Falling Trees, Accessible Step, Scout, etc.
- Most of Yung's Better Builds are included, along with numerous other structure mods.
- World Host: Lets you invite friends to your world without hosting a server. Just make sure they're running this modpack as well.
  
There are too many mods to list here (around 200) but the majority are quality of life and ambience mods. Have fun!
